reviews.review_description: I played this game it got so much going for it  I love the graphics are A+++ game playing mechanics are good need be inprove little bit  fine toon  other than that  cant wait see what you bring next  love  this game so far it one my top games now hope see more updates  thanks you so much for great game  hands down  must play game 🎮 👮‍♂️👮‍♂️

This lengthy game surprised me with the amount of depth it has. The prison is a full size prison including outside yard, exercise apparatus such as dumbbells, pullup bar, basketball court, guard towers, showers (don't drop the soap) and Death Row with electric chair. You unlock more areas and jobs as you progress. Lots of NPC's walking about, many different looking characters, they must use some type of randomized character system as I have not seen any exact doppelgangers and when I restarted the prisoners in my charge were all different, they look good, some with tattoos all over their face and what not. There are mini games to do in your free time,  darts in the guards room which has many different rule variations, you can have a little bet with fellow guards, a shooting range with three different modes, gym and basketball with bets with prisoners. Lots of different types of jobs you have to do as a Prison guard other than guarding such as taking the prisoners to work, searching parcels, document validating, searching cells, cleaning with pressure cleaner. Things can go wrong in all sorts of ways and the events are never the same, things like fights or fires break out which you have to deal with, prisoners can get injured and you send them to the infirmary. You can be a good guard or bad guard with reputation system, level up and there is a skill tree to unlock skills to help you in your career, you also get to improve the prison by ordering equipment as the Prison Warden gives you the keys to the castle, you can buy all sorts of stuff for the prison and yourself including Dark Side or Light Side baton. There is a separate Free mode and within the Campaign mode selection there are other modes which I have not tried. The game is a little bit clunky in places but nothing you will not get use to and for the money the game is an absolute bargain if you fancy being a Prison Guard. A nice surprise which kind of made me think how a Bully VR game would be.

When I bought this game I was having a lot of fun for playing it for a day or two, but I feel like the developers should update this game to make it better it has great potential to be a great game but if it’s doesn’t have updates then it just a waste but a great game just need updates. Also makes everything intractable, making it easier to grab the clipboard and your bag, and tweak the graphics and fighting. Also everyone should have an actual voice but overall a good game.

, I tried slapping a cop officer and then it just doesn't work in game sucks, don't buy waste of money.Whenever I first started the game , I couldn't even play so then I finally found out how to play I got in the game and the cops don't even fall whenever I hit them waste of money.

This game definitely has potential to be funny but you mostly have to make your own fun. You’re a rookie cop in this game and you have to balance between being on the good side of your fellow cops but also with the jail mates. There’s hardly any interactions unless on items during a task. Youd complete tasks (aka missions) to earn money. It’s almost a deal breaker for I having to choose chat options when conversing with the NPCs. while the NPCs do talk, they talk in jiberish. While funny at first, it became more of an irritance. You can beat up jail mates but they keep fight backing back till another officer handles them. Most of the jail mates have the same script so disappointing there aren’t more uniqueness.
